summary: Pest technician application with GPS location and mapping features

existing_features.title: Add a Google Maps integration to display technician locations on an interactive map when viewing search results in TechnicianFinder.tsx
Add a map icon button in the bottom navigation or header that toggles the Google Maps view for technician locations

new_feature_requests.summary: Add Google Maps GPS location finder with icon for pest technicians
Add latitude and longitude fields to the Technician type in backend/main.mo to support GPS coordinates for map display
Create a migration in backend/migration.mo to add default GPS coordinates to existing Technician records
